@everyone

 Heed the Voice of Iris  

The universe had been hiding it, and it took insanity to find it. 

Episode #1 of the Star Atlas graphic novel, CORE, will be released on November 7 on the Galactic Marketplace and Magic Eden!

Learn more about CORE: https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel
